trading funds, profit collection, and automatic fee distribution  Security Features: - ReentrancyGuard: Prevents reentrancy attacks on all external calls - Pausable: Emergency stop functionality - Two-step ownership transfer - Fee caps enforced (max 10% trading fee, 50% profit share) - Trade limits (max trade size, daily limits) - Event emission for all state changes  Financial Flow: 1. Owner deposits trading capital (USDC/ETH) 2. AI agent executes trades from escrow 3. Profits accumulate in escrow 4. Fees automatically deducted per trade 5. Owner withdraws profits to owner wallet  References: - x402 Payment Protocol: Collects API usage fees separately - DEX Executor: Uses escrow funds for Uniswap/Jupiter swaps","kind":"dev","methods":{"addSupportedToken(address)":{"params":{"token":"Token contract address"}},"depositToken(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount to deposit","token":"Token emergencyWithdraw(address).details: Pauses contract automatically on emergency withdrawal

params.isProfit: Whether this trade resulted in profit

params._threshold: Minimum profit to trigger auto-withdrawal (0 = disabled)

params._x402AllocationBps: X402 fee allocation in basis points (max 1000 = 10%)

params._dailyTradeLimit: Maximum trades per day (0 = no limit)
params._maxTradeSize: Maximum single trade size (0 = no limit)

addSupportedToken(address).notice: Add a supported token for trading

executeTrade(bytes32,address,address,uin.notice: Execute a trade from escrow (called by AI agent)

withdrawAllProfits().notice: Withdraw all profits to owner wallet
